name: Jumbo Towel Holder - Threshold™
description: Leave the old under-cabinet plastic towel dispenser in the past with the Threshold Jumbo Towel Holder. Grab a single sheet without running away with the whole roll thanks to the smart arm design. Let the stainless steel construction of this towel holder take center stage on your countertop while it saves you time and frustration messing with bulky paper towel rolls. The classic design makes it go with any kitchen decor.
